description: Ability to drive organizational growth and change.

signals: I have an impact on one or more system modules, focusing on local improvements
I communicate directly with the module's stakeholders
examples: I predominantly work on one service my team owns, ensuring best practices are followed and sharing knowledge with immediate stakeholders
I improved a service module and posted a summary for the team

signals: I influence the entire team, not just specific modules
I effectively communicate ideas, present solutions, and facilitate knowledge sharing
examples: I'm a key team member who regularly leads discussions on best practices, organizes internal demos, and encourages continuous feedback loops
I ran a demo to align the team on a new testing approach and documented lessons learned

signals: I expand my influence beyond my own team, actively engaging with other teams
I share learnings, align on processes, and coordinate technical decisions
examples: I participate in cross-team forums, present solutions that multiple teams adopt, and maintain open channels for exchanging feedback and domain insights
I facilitated a design review with multiple teams for an integration and coordinated their decisions

signals: I have a direct impact on more than one team, scaling best practices and improvements
I establish external networks and drive improvements that shape multiple teams' work and outcomes
examples: I led a six-month compliance initiative involving three internal teams and an external vendor, ensuring alignment, effective communication, and timely delivery across all stakeholders
I shared reusable patterns that improved delivery speed across multiple squads

signals: I drive organizational change across the entire tech organization
I build external networks, champion best practices, and ensure knowledge sharing at scale
examples: I designed and implemented the Flow initiative, introducing a new cross-organizational process for continuous improvement, recognized both internally and externally through presentations and industry meetups
I established a company-wide mentoring program and influenced senior leadership decisions with clear technical narratives
